## Checklist

- [ ] The solution builds (`dotnet build OpenClean.sln -c Release`).
- [ ] I followed the existing code style (`.editorconfig`).
- [ ] No telemetry, tracking, or fake results were introduced.
- [ ] If UI strings changed, **all** language files were updated.
- [ ] User-facing changes are noted under "Unreleased" in `CHANGELOG.md`.
